label: Stuff appearance
description: Defines a visual appearance variant for stuff textures (smooth, planks, bricks, metal) used when rendering stuff-dependent buildings.

pathPrefix.label: Path prefix
pathPrefix.description: Texture path prefix the game uses when selecting stuff appearance sprites. Not used by any shipped entry; intended as a mod customization point.

new-stuff-appearance.label: New stuff appearance
new-stuff-appearance.description: Minimal stuff appearance with a label.
